zh.lifeSummary: 當Comte Charles II de Valois le Magnanime, comte d'Alencon於1297年出生在法國瑟-吉馬內豐泰布利奧時，他的父親Charles de Valois comte de Valois27歲，母親Marguerite d'Anjou25歲。他於1314年4月與Jeanne de Joigny Duchess of Bretagne, d.s.p.在法國結婚。他去世於1346年8月26日在法國皮卡迪索姆可雷希--朋提額享年49歲，埋葬在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Comte Charles II de Valois le Magnanime, comte d'Alencon于1297年出生在法国瑟-吉馬內豐泰布利奧时，他的父亲Charles de Valois comte de Valois27岁，母亲Marguerite d'Anjou25岁。他于1314年4月与Jeanne de Joigny Duchess of Bretagne, d.s.p.在法国结婚。他去世于1346年8月26日在法国皮卡迪索姆可雷希--朋提額享年49岁，埋葬在法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲。

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Valois

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Andre, Henri, Normand, Alcide, Armand, Emilien, Gilberte, Gilles, Herve, Jacques, Lucien.
habitational name from (Le) Valois, the name of a few places in France, e.g. in Forez and Limousin.

nameMeanings.name: Charles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Germanic word, karl, meaning ‘free man’, akin to Old English ceorl ‘man’. The name, Latin form Carolus, owed its popularity in medieval Europe to the Frankish leader Charlemagne ( ?742–814 ), who in 800 established himself as Holy Roman Emperor. His name (Latin Carolus Magnus) means ‘Charles the Great’. Carolus—or Karl, the German form—was a common name among Frankish leaders, including Charlemagne's grandfather Charles Martel ( 688–741 ). Charles is the French form. The name occurs occasionally in medieval Britain as Karolus or Carolus; it had a certain vogue in West Yorkshire from the 1400s, particularly among gentry families. The form Charles was chosen by Mary Queen of Scots ( 1542–87 ), who had been brought up in France, for her son, Charles James ( 1566–1625 ), who became King James VI of Scotland and, from 1603 , James I of England. His son and grandson both reigned as King Charles , and the name thus became established in the 17th century both in the Stuart royal house and among English and Scottish supporters of the Stuart monarchy. In the 18th century it was to some extent favoured, along with James , by Jacobites, supporters of the exiled Stuarts, opposed to the Hanoverian monarchy, especially in the Highlands of Scotland. In the 19th century the popularity of the name was further enhanced by romanticization of the story of ‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’, leader of the 1745 rebellion.

en.lifeSummary: When Comte Charles II de Valois le Magnanime, comte d'Alencon was born in 1297, in Fontainebleau, Seine-et-Marne, France, his father, Charles de Valois comte de Valois, was 27 and his mother, Marguerite d'Anjou, was 25. He married Jeanne de Joigny Duchess of Bretagne, d.s.p. in April 1314, in France. He died on 26 August 1346, in Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 49, and was buried in Paris, Île-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Comte Charles II de Valois le Magnanime, comte d'Alencon est né en 1297, à Fontainebleau, Seine-et-Marne, France, son père, Charles de Valois comte de Valois, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Marguerite d'Anjou, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne de Joigny Duchess of Bretagne, d.s.p. en avril 1314, à France. Il est décédé le 26 août 1346, à Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Paris, Île-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Comte Charles II de Valois le Magnanime, comte d'Alencon 1297 in Fontainebleau, Seine-et-Marne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Charles de Valois comte de Valois 27 und seine Mutter Marguerite d'Anjou 25. Er hat im April 1314 in Frankreich Jeanne de Joigny Duchess of Bretagne, d.s.p. geheiratet. Er starb am 26. August 1346 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich und wurde in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Comte Charles II de Valois le Magnanime, comte d'Alencon è nato il nel 1297 nel Fontainebleau, Seine-et-Marne, Francia, il suo padre, Charles de Valois comte de Valois, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Marguerite d'Anjou, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne de Joigny Duchess of Bretagne, d.s.p. nel aprile 1314, nel Francia. Morì il 26 agosto 1346, nel Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Paris, Île-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Comte Charles II de Valois le Magnanime, comte d'Alenconが1297年にフランスセアイネ-エト-マルンフォンティアイネブレアウで生まれた時，父Charles de Valois comte de Valoisは27歳，母Marguerite d'Anjouは25歳であった。1314年4月にフランスでJeanne de Joigny Duchess of Bretagne, d.s.p.と結婚した。彼は1346年8月26日にフランスピカーディソンメクルeシ-エン-プオンスイエウで49歳で死去し，フランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Comte Charles II de Valois le Magnanime, comte d'Alencon(이)가 1297년 프랑스 세이인-트-마니 폰테인블리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Charles de Valois comte de Valois(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Marguerite d'Anjou(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1314년 4월 프랑스에서 Jeanne de Joigny Duchess of Bretagne, d.s.p.(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1346년 8월 26일 프랑스 피카디 솜 크e시--폰스이외에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Comte Charles II de Valois le Magnanime, comte d'Alencon nasceu em 1297, em Fontainebleau, Seine-et-Marne, França, seu pai, Charles de Valois comte de Valois, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite d'Anjou, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne de Joigny Duchess of Bretagne, d.s.p. em abril de 1314, em França. Ele faleceu em 26 de agosto de 1346, em Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Picardie, França, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Paris, Île-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Comte Charles II de Valois le Magnanime, comte d'Alencon родился в 1297 г. в местности фонтеинебло, сине-ет-марн, Франция, его отцу по имени Charles de Valois comte de Valois было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Marguerite d'Anjou, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne de Joigny Duchess of Bretagne, d.s.p. апрель 1314 г. в местности Франция. Он умер 26 августа 1346 г. в местности крeси-ен-понтиеу, сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Comte Charles II de Valois le Magnanime, comte d'Alencon nació en 1297, en Fontainebleau, Seine-et-Marne, Francia, su papá, Charles de Valois comte de Valois, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Marguerite d'Anjou, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Jeanne de Joigny Duchess of Bretagne, d.s.p. en abril de 1314, en Francia. Murió el 26 de agosto de 1346, en Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia.
